---
title: Air pollution dispersion models for human exposure predictions in London
date: '2013-01-01'
author:
- S.D. Beevers
- N. Kitwiroon
- M.L. Williams
- F.J. Kelly
- H. Ross Anderson
- D.C. Carslaw
categories:
- Journal Article
publication: '*Journal of Exposure Science and Environmental Epidemiology*'
---

## Air pollution dispersion models for human exposure predictions in London

<p class="pub-meta">S.D. Beevers, N. Kitwiroon, M.L. Williams, F.J. Kelly, H. Ross Anderson, D.C. Carslaw</p>

_*Journal of Exposure Science and Environmental Epidemiology*_, 2013


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="carslaw-2013.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
